title: CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides customized employment and training activities. The goal is to prepare as many clients as possible for unsubsidized employment with employers identified through job development activities. 821 Main Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but some programs have specialized target populations, such as public assistance recipients, public housing residents, and individuals involved with the County Corrections Department Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 655-8840 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8840 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located next to the Oregon City Transit Center on Main Street between 10th Street and 11th Street. TriMet bus lines 31, 32, 33, 34 ,35, 99, 154, and CAT (Canby Area Transit). Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Ex-Offender Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EARLY CHILDHOOD AND FAMILY ADVISORY GROUPS EMPLOYMENT - CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLACKAMAS EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
